features.featureTitle: Add a full-screen welcome gate that appears before any website content is visible. The gate must display a single button labeled 'Welcome Cutee'. Only after the user clicks this button should the main website content (LoveLetterPage) become visible. The gate should fill the entire viewport with a visually matching dark/romantic background consistent with the existing theme, and the button should be styled to match the gold/maroon romantic aesthetic defined in the project.
